Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/
Avvik: 101 | Bestått: 544
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body lang="nn"> <script async="" data-bot-key="b4e04413-2865-4da8-b863-7f0f053974f2" id="kindly-chat" src="https://chat.kindlycdn.com/kindly-chat.js"></script> <div class="client-content-widget-wrapp
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innho
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (75 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-2/hallplan-etter-skuletid.28690.aspx
Avvik: 86 | Bestått: 468
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/
Avvik: 101 | Bestått: 544
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body lang="nn"> <script async="" data-bot-key="b4e04413-2865-4da8-b863-7f0f053974f2" id="kindly-chat" src="https://chat.kindlycdn.com/kindly-chat.js"></script> <div class="client-content-widget-wrapp
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innho
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (75 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00

Utleige Bokn Arena - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/bestilling-ressurs/utleige-bokn-arena/
Avvik: 86 | Bestått: 485
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="ac-content-teaser-title"> <a class="ac-content-link ac-content-teaser-title-link" href="/bestilling-ressurs/utleige-bokn-arena/bokn-arena-boknahave.24075.aspx"> <span class="ac-content-teas
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="" data-id="32" href="https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-bokn-kommune.21077.aspx" target="_blank"><span class="img"></span><span class="text">Rss</span></a>

2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

Kontaktinformasjon - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/tenester/organisasjon/kontakt-oss/
Avvik: 85 | Bestått: 467
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Bokn Arena - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/bokn-arena/
Avvik: 85 | Bestått: 470
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Invitasjon til open kontordag i samband med reguleringsplan for Gamle Holmen, Føresvik. - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-2/invitasjon-til-open-kontordag-i-samband-med-reguleringsplan-for-gamle-holmen-foresvik.30005.aspx
Avvik: 86 | Bestått: 467
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

Ordførar - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/politikk-og-demokrati/ordforar/
Avvik: 91 | Bestått: 500
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (67 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Kommunebussen - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/om-bokn/kommunebuss/
Avvik: 89 | Bestått: 493
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="uu-empty"> </h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h2 class="uu-empty"> </h2>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Meld feil (nabolaget mitt) - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/meld-feil-nabolaget-mitt/#/viewCases
Avvik: 85 | Bestått: 486
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="clientapp/angular/build/release/nabolaget/assets/images/marker-new.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="clientapp/angular/build/release/nabolaget/assets/images/marker-ongoing.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img src="clientapp/angular/build/release/nabolaget/assets/images/marker-closed.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg focusable="false" preserveaspectratio="xMidYMid meet" style="width: 100px; height: 100px;" viewbox="0 0 100 100"><!-- --><circle cx="50%" cy="50%" r="45" style="animation-name: mat-progress-spinn
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body lang="nn"> <script async="" data-bot-key="b4e04413-2865-4da8-b863-7f0f053974f2" id="kindly-chat" src="https://chat.kindlycdn.com/kindly-chat.js"></script> <div class="client-content-widget-wrapp
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<input class="nabolaget-form-textbox ng-untouched ng-pristine ng-valid" name="searchTerm" type="text"/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive button has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<button class="cms-direkteredigering-login-button js-cms-direkteredigering-login-button" tabindex="-1" type="button"> <span class="cms-direkteredigering-login-button-text"> Innlogg
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" frameborder="0" style="z-index: -1; position: absolute; width: 100%; height: 100%; top: 0px; left: 0px; border: none; opacity: 0;" tabindex="-1"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Tenester - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/tenester/
Avvik: 83 | Bestått: 463
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

MODERATE

Sida finst ikkje - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/kalender/
Avvik: 78 | Bestått: 452
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (62 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

SERIOUS

Sletting av studiegjeld - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-2/sletting-av-studiegjeld.30010.aspx
Avvik: 79 | Bestått: 456
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (63 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="" data-id="32" href="https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-bokn-kommune.21077.aspx" target="_blank"><span class="img"></span><span class="text">Rss</span></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)

Aktivitetsplattforma Friskus - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-2/aktivitetsplattforma-friskus.30025.aspx
Avvik: 77 | Bestått: 458
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

Nettmøte om fosterheimar - Bokn kommune

https://www.bokn.kommune.no/nyhende-2/nettmote-om-fosterheimar.30024.aspx
Avvik: 77 | Bestått: 455
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3><span>OM BOKN</span></h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no main landmark

<body>
Add <main> element or role='main' to wrap primary content
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav id="mainMenu"> <div class="section-main-menu-inner"> <!-- Start sone --> <div class="zone Zone webPartZoneVertical" id="Sone11021"> <div class="webPart wp-header-menu" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (61 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a class="default" href="/" id="ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_ctl00_innhold_hlDefault"> <img class="default" src="/design/bokn_kommune/bokn/v2015/assets/images/logo.svg"/> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
